experiment_config.description: Experiment-execution config. Required: `dataset_name`, `dataset_id` (UUID of a test-suite dataset), `prompts` (non-empty list of `{model, messages, configs?, prompt_version_id?}`). Optional: `dataset_version_id`, `version_hash`, `project_name`. One experiment is created per prompt variant. Call `schema("run_experiment")` if the shape is unclear.
experiment_config.title: Experiment Config
